action.reasoning: Observation: the latest single raw ridge run dropped further to 0.2863 eval, while the best recoverable checkpoints in workspace are older stable raw/ensemble variants around 0.30; the true best 0.3684 is lost. Analysis: with only 6 iterations left, further retraining is unlikely to beat the known stable checkpoint family, and the safest move is to resubmit the strongest existing checkpoint among saved artifacts. Based on history, checkpoints/raw_sweep_ensemble.pt corresponds to the 0.3037-era stable raw sweep and is the highest-probability recoverable model. Decision: submit the existing raw_sweep_ensemble checkpoint immediately to try to recover the earlier ~0.30 score without risking more regressions.
